text:
Centipede (ムカデ男, Mukade Otoko—lit. "Centipede Man") Hunter × Hunter - Episode 79 (2011) was a Chimera Ant Soldier from Yunju's Squad division. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 192 

Appearance

Centipede was a Chimera Ant that resembled a humanoid centipede with sixteen arms, yellow skin, and mannequin-like articulations. He was bald, with three black spots on his forehead, and had a goatee. His eyes were oval that contained green sclerae and cruciform black pupils.

Personality

He displayed confidence with his "Thousand-Hand Fist" move. He's also a bit logical, cunning, and observant. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 193 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Gon, Killua, and Kite meet Yunju's division inside a hidden drug factory of NGL. They start to fight and Centipede is sent after Gon. During the fight, Centipede is amazed by Gon's enormous physical strength and starts to feel his Nen. Afraid that he cannot escape as his leader is watching, he decides to battle Gon. Centipede, intimidated by Gon's power, runs a simulation where he assumes that Gon will use his fist to attack him and that he would parry it at the cost of one side of his arms in order to bite him. 

Unfortunately for Centipede, Gon, instead of his fists, uses his Janken: Scissors Nen ability and bifurcates him. Fatally injured but not dead, Centipede waits on the floor for Gon to come near him so that he can at least poison him with his fangs, but is shot dead by Kite, who tells Gon that he needs to crush the Chimera Ants' head to be sure that they are dead. 

Abilities & Powers

Centipede, like all Chimera Ants, is stronger than normal humans. In battle, he uses his numerous arms to deliver a barrage of fists against his enemies. As a last resort, Centipede can also poison them with his poisonous fangs. 

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

The character's name was never given in the manga, and the 2011 anime adaptation only identifies him by his type of species in the credits.
He is referred to as ムカデ男 (Mukade Otoko, Nippon TV - HUNTER×HUNTER - Chimera Ant: characters page literally "Centipede Man").
In the credits for the English dub: "Centipede".
